architecture_2. **`src/data/rjeos.json: 94-95`** — Added OEM Social design direction with full visual language description (flat white typography, 2px vertical divider, left-aligned model stack, script signature bottom-right)

architecture_`src/app/ai-prompt-studio/g: `src/app/ai-prompt-studio/generators/page.tsx` — Same pattern; added state in `GeneratorsContent`, passes `useOwnPhotos` prop to `GeneratorCard`
build_**root cause**: `getSelectedContent()` in the Generators page had no dynamic vehicle block override — unlike the Builder's `formatPrompt()` which had `if (blockId === "vehicle") return buildDynamicVehicleBlock(...)`. So every generator prompt fell back to the static default "BYD Seal" from `blocks.json` regardles...
build_**the key architectural note: ** Since this site is a static export (no API routes), there's a risk of stale data in `public/data/`. I'd add a pre-build copy step so `public/data/` always mirrors `src/data/` — want me to wire that up?
build_`/ai-prompt-studio/builder`_—_core: `/ai-prompt-studio/builder` — Core Prompt Builder with expandable block selectors, live prompt preview, large COPY PROMPT button with success animation, save to history, reset
build_`/ai-prompt-studio/generators`_—_1: `/ai-prompt-studio/generators` — 16 generator preset cards with copy-to-clipboard and Open Builder links
build_`/marketing-ai/prompt-builder`_—_6: `/marketing-ai/prompt-builder` — 6 AI tool profiles with prompt enhancers
build_`src/app/ai-prompt-studio/builder/: `src/app/ai-prompt-studio/builder/page.tsx` — Converted `strictRulesHeader` const to `buildStrictRulesHeader(useOwnPhotos)` function; added state + checkbox in Vehicle Context section; wired into `formatPrompt`
build_done. compacted further: card `space-y-2→1.5`, template pills `gap-1.5→1`, labels `mb-1→0.5`, selects `mt-1.5→1`, all pill groups `gap-1.5→1`, pre block `p-2→1.5`. Build passes.
build_done. output now shows `model: Seal 6 Premium` — no more redundant "BYD " prefix. Build ✅

database_4. **order**: Vehicle DB → Finance Calc → Charging → Warranty → AI Prompts
database_dashboard_quick_links_vehicle: Dashboard quick links Vehicle DB & RJEOS tukar guna `<a>` tag → full page load, takde prefetch
database_nota: **M6 Standard** tiada dalam database — M6 cuma ada varian "Extended". Nak tambah varian Standard?
database_segment,_torque,_0-100_semua: Segment, Torque, 0-100 semua keluar from database — no more hardcoded "—" or "FWD"
deployment_**testing**: Check `https://bydmiri-data.netlify.app/data/promotions.json` pastikan values betul lepas deploy.
deployment_3. **main website** dah指向 `ht: //bydmiri-data.netlify.app/data/*.json` — so lepas deploy, refresh je, pricing baru automatik tarik masuk.
fact_api_notes: /data page lists all 10 JSON datasets with file icons and links. Warning card about JSON-only format for AI agents.
fact_architecture: Next.js 16 App Router. Tailwind CSS v4. TypeScript strict. Data stored in 10 static JSON files in src/data/. Static export via next.config.ts.
fact_build: `npm run build` — static export to `out/`. TypeScript strict mode. Build time ~3s.
fact_changelog_timeline: Timeline UI with vertical line, dots, and bordered cards. Version badges with dates.
fact_command_palette: Global CMD+K command palette. Search vehicles, pages, pricing. Keyboard navigation with arrow keys. Categories: Page, Vehicle.
fact_dashboard: Hero section with stats (Models, Variants, Rebates, Interest Rate). Quick actions grid (Vehicle DB, Handbook, Finance Calc, AI Prompts). Finance calculator, vehicle fleet cards, finance rules, sales rules with colored borders, charging network, AI agent section, changelog timeline.
fact_design_system: Geist Sans/Mono fonts via next/font. Semantic color tokens (accent, success, warning, danger, neutral). Spacing scale 4/8/12/16/24/32/48/64/96. Radius sm/md/lg/xl. Shadow subtle/medium/elevated/dialog.
fact_geist: Geist Sans + Geist Mono via `geist` npm package. Set as CSS variables via next/font.
fact_globals_css: Complete design system in globals.css: card classes (card, card-elevated, card-interactive), badge system (blue/green/gray/amber), stat cards, data rows, pill buttons, toggle switches, form inputs, buttons (primary/secondary/ghost), status dots, kbd tags.
fact_loan_calculator: Flat-rate loan calculator. Model/variant selectors, rebate toggle, downpayment pills (0%/10%/15%/20%) + custom RM input, tenure pills (5/7/9 years). Live monthly payment, total interest, total payable. 5-column grid layout with controls on left and payment summary on right.
fact_navbar: Sticky navbar with glassmorphism effect on scroll. Desktop nav links + mobile hamburger menu. CMD+K search button in navbar.
fact_pages: `/` Dashboard, `/vehicles` Vehicle Database, `/handbook` Handbook, `/data` API/JSON index, `/changelog` Changelog
fact_prompt_generator: 6 template types (Product Desc, Sales Pitch, Social, Q&A, Compare, Image). SSOT-driven prompt generation with sales rules, finance context, charging network, company info. Dark pre block for output. Copy button with success feedback.
fact_vehicle_db: `/vehicles` page. Complete catalog grouped by model. Each variant card shows OTR price, rebate, effective price, range, battery, max charge, monthly instalments. Grid layout 1/2/3 columns responsive.

**Cost** — AC: RM0.30/kWh. DC: tunjuk range RM1.00 – RM1.40/kWh

general_**effective power logic**: AC → min(charger kW, variant's `acCharging`), DC → min(charger kW, `maxChargePower`).
general_**effective_power**:_ac_→: **Effective power**: AC → min(charger power, variant's `acCharging`), DC → min(charger power, `maxChargePower`)
general_**effective_power**_—_untuk: **Effective Power** — untuk DC: guna min(charger kW, maxChargePower variant). Contoh Atto 3 Ultra (110kW max) charge guna 180kW charger → effective 110kW. Untuk AC: capped at 7kW (onboard charger limit).

general_**ringkasan**: Kau ada **3 pricing layers** — (1) **BYD** (EM OTR with ins, with rebates), (2) **Competitors** (WM OTR, +EM markup), (3) **Operational costs** (charging RM0.30–RM1.50/kWh). Semua display dalam Loan Calculator guna flat-rate 2.30% over 2–9 years.

style_\u003e - **calculation**: Flat-rate formula — `totalInterest = loanAmount × rate × tenure`, then `monthly = (loanAmount + totalInterest) / (tenure × 12)`
